title: ouret persica var. lanata
intro: Ouret persica var. lanata, also known as the Persian silk tree or woolly Persian silk tree, is a deciduous tree native to the Middle East and Central Asia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ouret persica var. lanata include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of Ouret persica var. lanata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
